decision: DELETION NOT AUTHORIZED - RED gates 8/10/11/19 require the integration to be implemented+merged+clean-clone-proven and the retirement receipt committed. The goal's own rule 'No deletion with a red gate' governs. The full archive bundle (recovery-proven) makes the packs repo lossless regardless.

11_no_runtime_dependency.v: RED-by-spirit - capabilities not yet absorbed; hawking today has zero dep on packs but the useful mass is not yet in hawking

17_no_unpushed_unique_commits.v: no remote; every ref in bundle

19_retirement_receipt_committed.v: RED - created at docs/history/HAWKING_PACKS_RETIREMENT.json, not git-committed (no commit made this session)

2_exact_packs_remote_identified.v: NONE (no git remote) -> Section 25 has no target

3_target_proven_not_main_hawking.v: distinct path; packs has no remote so cannot be the hawking remote

remote_deletion: N/A - packs repo has NO remote (Section 25 has no target; this is an ABSENCE not a permission blocker)
